docs.title: Welcome to SOIRÉE!
docs.text:
Promoting interdisciplinary activities across continents.

The Society of Interdisciplinary Research (SOIRÉE) is an organisation founded by a group of professionals including scientists, engineers and entrepreneurs. We aim to serve as a platform for interaction and collaboration in interdisciplinary culture, science, technology, and research inter-continent.

docs.title: About Us
docs.text: The Society of Interdisciplinary Research (SOIRÉE) is an organisation founded by a group of professionals including scientists, engineers and entrepreneurs. We aim to serve as a platform for interaction and collaboration in interdisciplinary culture, science, technology, and research inter-continent.

docs.title: Activities
docs.text:
Society of Interdisciplinary Research (SOIRÉE) is an international forum for scholars, researchers, and practitioners to share their recent discoveries and developments in an interdisciplinary way. Our overarching goal is to shape the future by promoting emerging solutions to grand challenges in the 21st Century.

  • To keep our members updated about major developments in culture, science and technology, as well as informed about upcoming conferences; to serve as a platform for our members to promote their research results and assist them in fostering partnerships.

  • To organise various technological and industrial forums, training sessions, industrial attachments and to facilitate interactions between the academic and commercial sectors.

  • With a learned and well-known group of scientists and professionals, SOIRÉE is able to provide professional advice and consultations on scientific research, commercialisation and project management.

Our Mission →{ .md-button .md-button--primary } Become a Member →{ .md-button }

docs.title: Membership
docs.text: SOIRÉE welcomes professionals, scholars, researchers, and practitioners who share our commitment to interdisciplinary science, technology, and collaboration across continents.

docs.title: Why Join SOIRÉE?
docs.text:
• Stay updated on major developments in culture, science and technology
  • Access announcements of upcoming conferences and events
  • Promote your research results through our platform
  • Foster partnerships with fellow members across disciplines and continents
  • Participate in forums, workshops, training sessions and industrial attachments
  • Benefit from professional advice and consultation from our executive committee

docs.title: How to Apply
docs.text:
Send your application to president.soiree@gmail.com with:

  • Full Name
  • Current Affiliation / Organisation
  • City & Country
  • Email Address
  • Area of Expertise / Research Interests
  • Brief statement on why you wish to join SOIRÉE

docs.title: Membership Categories
docs.text: Type Description Regular Member Professionals, researchers, and academics Student Member Graduate and postgraduate students Institutional Member Universities, research institutes, and organisations Honorary Member By invitation — distinguished contributors

docs.title: Mission & Vision
docs.text:
SOIRÉE's mission is to promote the interaction and advancement of science and technology worldwide. Our objectives are as follows:

  1. To provide a platform for communication, cooperation and construction in interdisciplinary science and technology.

  2. To promote and organise activities for science and technology interactions among its members, as well as between scientific organisations, universities, institutions and government agencies.

  3. To facilitate the exchange and collaboration in scientific research, education and business development.

  4. To provide professional consultation in science and technology, as well as assistance in fostering strategic partnerships between the relevant worldwide government bodies.

docs.title: How We Accomplish Our Mission
docs.text:
To accomplish our mission, SOIRÉE will organize trade missions, forums, exhibitions and industrial visits. SOIRÉE will publicise major scientific developments and announcements of major scientific events and forums. With the strong academic credentials of its members, SOIRÉE can help our members promote their research results and assist in fostering partnerships to bridge the gap between research and commercialisation.

With a group of scientists and professionals on its executive committee, SOIRÉE will provide professional advice and consultation on scientific research, commercialisation and project management. SOIRÉE is able to assist our members to fulfil their potentials through organising training sessions, industrial attachments and internship programmes.

Your milestone deserves a bespoke experience. We design private events that reflect your personality, bringing together the finest in food, décor, entertainment, and ambience.

Make your brand impossible to ignore. We create immersive activations that connect your audience with your story in a meaningful, memorable way.

Exclusive private dining with bespoke menus crafted in collaboration with Hong Kong's top chefs. From intimate dinners for 10 to lavish banquets for 300.

docs.title: Centers
docs.text: SOIRÉE operates two specialised centres covering science & technology and arts & culture.

docs.title: AiForce
docs.text:
Applying artificial intelligence to frontier challenges in chemistry, biology, and technology.

Learn More →{ .md-button .md-button--primary }

docs.title: Art Center
docs.text:
Exploring the intersection of arts and science through watercolor and photography.

Learn More →{ .md-button }

docs.title: Center of AiForce
docs.text: AI is revolutionizing scientific research and development in academy and industry. By leveraging vast datasets and advanced algorithms, AI can uncover hidden patterns, accelerate data analysis, and generate novel hypotheses. The Center of AiForce tackles a wide range of challenging problems in chemistry, biology and technology.

docs.title: Chemistry
docs.text:
AI revolutionizes drug discovery, optimizes reactions, and predicts compound properties with unprecedented precision. Through AI-driven automation and robotics, high-throughput experimentation reaches new heights of efficiency and innovation.

Current Projects: Homogeneous Nickle Catalysis (HONICA)

docs.title: Biology
docs.text:
AI accelerates genomics, precision medicine, and drug development. It empowers image analysis and pathology, unveiling intricate patterns and aiding in disease diagnosis.

Current Projects:

  • SARS-CoV-2
  • Complex Microbiota

docs.title: Technology
docs.text:
AI is making a transformative imprint on information, energy, environment and other technology sectors.

Current Projects: DNA Storage, Advanced Materials

docs.title: Photo Gallery
docs.text: These images are subject to copyright. Please contact SOIRÉE for permission and licensing information.

docs.title: Istana — Singapore
docs.text: The Istana estate in Singapore is the official residence of the President. Located in the Orchard Road area, it includes the Istana Main Building and expansive gardens. The estate hosts state functions and is open to the public on special occasions, providing a glimpse into the President's residence and serving as a symbol of national pride.

docs.title: Nan Lian Garden — Diamond Hill, Hong Kong
docs.text: Nestled in Diamond Hill, the Nan Lian Garden is a serene sanctuary where man and nature harmonise. Delicate pathways wind through lush foliage, leading to a shimmering lotus pond and enchanting pavilions. With its meticulously curated landscape and traditional Chinese design, the garden embodies tranquility and offers a respite from the outside world.

docs.title: Cherry Blossom at Shukugawa Park — Nishinomiya City, Japan
docs.text: Shukugawa Park in Nishinomiya City, Japan, is famous for its cherry blossoms. During late March to early April, the park becomes a stunning sight with pink and white flowers. People come to have picnics, walk around, and enjoy the beautiful scenery.

docs.title: Flying Kite in Sai Kung — Hong Kong
docs.text:
This colourful kite creates a pleasant contrast against the beautiful blue sky. On weekends, the Sai Kung waterfront becomes bustling with adorable dogs and people. You will come across vendors selling kites, pet accessories, seafood, and many other fun things.

← Back to Art Center

docs.title: Watercolor Painting Gallery
docs.text: These images are subject to copyright. Please contact SOIRÉE for permission and licensing information.

docs.title: China Express, Take Away and Delivery — Osaka, Japan
docs.text: In Osaka, there are so many food outlets, but China Express is located in a rather odd place, along a busy road with only a few buildings nearby. The bright yellow tent-like rain shade makes the whole building look unique. It is a piece of history as the catering place is now closed, but it brought a lot of warmth and friendship to many residents in Osaka by offering not only delicious food but also love over the past 20 years.

docs.title: Café Lodge — Japan
docs.text: Located in a peaceful suburb of Japan, this charming café stands out with its Western-style architecture. Amidst the sea of grey rooftops, its bright orange-yellow colour brings a cheerful atmosphere to the entire community. The interior is decorated in a sophisticated English style — each piece of decoration adds to the ambiance, making it feel like a museum.

docs.title: The Wave in Singapore
docs.text: The Wave is an indoor sports hall in Singapore. It is a wave-shaped structure that combines nature and technology. The wave's surface sparkles with colours and reflects light, creating a beautiful sight. It represents unity, creativity, and the endless potential of human imagination.

docs.title: The Shaw Auditorium — Clearwater Bay, Hong Kong
docs.text:
The Shaw Auditorium is a round-shaped building located in Clearwater Bay, Hong Kong. It serves as a multi-purpose space, functioning as a concert hall, study area, and meeting place. The auditorium hosts various cultural and artistic activities, while also providing a quiet space for students to focus on their studies.

← Back to Art Center

docs.text: The Center of Art explores the intersection of arts, culture and science — fostering creative exchanges across disciplinary and continental boundaries.
